facts.location: Service Ring Kappa, an AU-controlled Pallas Bloom industrial spoke manifold service ring.
geometry: Human-scale loop around central floor-to-ceiling manifold machinery.
Loop-inner face contains Kappa ports and service controls.
Loop-outer side contains anchor rails, cart locks, retrieval gear, lockers, break ledges, and entrances.
Operations glass and a short supervisor catwalk overlook part of the primary segment; central machinery blocks full sightlines to the far loop.
Kappa-7 False-Seam Artery branches from the loop-inner manifold into seal, air, condensate, and coolant systems.
coordinator_only: The immutable reference fixture is a quality bar, not a source to mutate.
Actor intent is not visible to other participants unless expressed through action or speech.

notes: Training-loop slice extracted from the Pallas reference fixture. It is a derivative receipt chain, not an edit to the reference Ink.
